description: PR-mined: real upstream commit 37b67200487beee92bf018c76cd6e43e518ad30d ('Translated using Weblate (German)', privacy-friendly-ruler). Retranslates pref_rightruler_default/pref_anglemeasure_default and a few other German strings; whitespace normalization. Applied as a full-file replacement (not a .patch) because vendor.json deliberately vendors two files both basenamed strings.xml (default + values-de) and fetch_vendored.py's patch step keys its base-file lookup on basename alone -- see vendor.json's note. No new string names, resources-only relink.
